Description:
A dungeon or trial will be selected at random from among those you have unlocked. Successful completion will earn you far greater rewards.

※Bonus EXP and gil will be awarded to compensate for the discrepancy between character and duty levels. A further percentage will then be added based on character level.
※The amount of bonus company seals awarded is determined by class/job level.
※The standard reward for this duty roulette category and all related bonuses are available once per day. The “adventurer in need” reward is always available.
※Joining this duty as a party meeting minimum size requirements will nullify any “adventurer in need” bonus.
A dungeon or trial will be selected at random from among those you have unlocked. Successful completion will earn you far greater rewards.

※Bonus EXP and gil will be awarded to compensate for the discrepancy between character and duty levels. A further percentage will then be added based on character level.
※The amount of bonus company seals awarded is determined by class/job level.
※The standard reward for this duty roulette category and all related bonuses are available once per day. Reward eligibility resets at <ResetTime>01</ResetTime><If(TopLevelParameter(218))><Switch(TopLevelParameter(218))><Case(1)>1</Case><Case(2)>2</Case><Case(3)>3</Case><Case(4)>4</Case><Case(5)>5</Case><Case(6)>6</Case><Case(7)>7</Case><Case(8)>8</Case><Case(9)>9</Case><Case(10)>10</Case><Case(11)>11</Case><Case(12)>12</Case><Case(13)>1</Case><Case(14)>2</Case><Case(15)>3</Case><Case(16)>4</Case><Case(17)>5</Case><Case(18)>6</Case><Case(19)>7</Case><Case(20)>8</Case><Case(21)>9</Case><Case(22)>10</Case><Case(23)>11</Case></Switch><Else/>12</If> <If(GreaterThanOrEqualTo(TopLevelParameter(218),12))>p.m.<Else/>a.m.</If> (Earth time) each day.
※The “adventurer in need” reward applies to the role in demand when registering for this duty.
※Joining this duty as a party meeting minimum size requirements will nullify any “adventurer in need” bonus.

※Bonus EXP and gil will be awarded to compensate for the discrepancy between character and duty levels. A further percentage will then be added based on character level.
